hero.title: Governance leh repository model
hero.lead: IATF chuan accessibility project-te chu mipui hmuh theih, chhiar theih leh enkawl theihin a siam a ni.
support: He page-ah hian eng nge tling tih te, repository neih dan te, pawm a nih hnu-a repo-pository level-a mawhphurhna hman a nih dan te tarlan a ni.

cards.title: Mission fit
paragraphs: IATF chuan hna thawh theih lohna dik tak leh mipuite tâna hlutna chiang tak nei chu a pawm a ni.
Project chu private workflow chauh ni lo, public repository anga hman theih a ni tur a ni.
Web accessibility-ah chuan IATF chuan [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Assistive technology hmangtute direct experience pawh hi hman tangkai tak tak a thil tangkai tih finfiahna a ni bawk.

cards.title: Project pawm
paragraphs: Enchhinna chuan a hnuaia mi ang hi a târ lan chuan rawtna chu pawm theih a ni:
items: Accessibility mamawhna dik tak chu a phuhruk a ni
harsatna chu a chiang khawp a, chhût theih a ni
a thlawna chhuah theih chin chu a awm tak tak a ni
hna hi IATF mission nen a inmil a ni
maintenance emaw, completion emaw thlenna kawng a awm a rinawm

cards.title: Repository neitu nihna
paragraphs: Project pawmte chu IATF GitHub organization hnuaiah siam a ni a.
Repositories-te chu chutah chuan an awm reng a, chuvângin project tinin mipuite chênna hmun nghet tak an nei a, a hnua enkawltute'n an thlak a nih pawhin.

cards.title: Licensing
paragraphs: IATF project-te hian a dang a sawi loh chuan copyleft licensing an hmang a:

maintainer.title: Engineer leh maintainer mawhphurtu
paragraphs: Project pawm apiangte chuan engineer emaw, maintainer emaw an nei tûr a ni a. Chu mi chuan repository-ah admin access a nei thei ang a, a hnuaia mite chu a beisei:
items: Repository structure chu vawng tha zel rawh
thil awmte ennawn emaw enkawl emaw, pull request-te
Technical decision pawimawh tak takte ziak
mi dangte'n an hriatthiam theih nân
maintainer.footnote: Hei hi repository level-a mawhphurhna a ni a. Organizational ownership chu IATF-ah a awm reng a ni. Hetah hian mawhphurtu chu repositories stewardship, technical direction, leh public coordination  ni lovin unlimited private delivery, custom integrations, or service-level commitments out of the public roadmap an ni.

publicDevelopment.title: Khawtlang hmasawnna
paragraphs: IATF kaltlanga project kalpui te chu mipuite hriat theihin siam a ni a. He repository hi a hnuaia mite hriat theihna bulpui a ni:
publicDevelopment.footnote: Project-a thil pawimawh hriatna chu private chat leh inbox-ah chauh awm tûr a ni lo.

paragraphs: IATF-in a hnathawhna hmun chu mipui hmuh theih a ni a. Website, email, Discord, GitHub, emaw IAT F channel dang atanga IAT-a request lutte chu mipui hriat theih record a lo ni thei a ni.

Public request record hi original message a ni kher lo a. IATF chuan a chhuah hmain a request a summarize, a redact emaw, a structure a tihdanglam thei a, chutichuan a ngaihna a hriat theih a, a ngai lo a personal information a chhuah loh theih a ni.
Public request records chu IATF GitHub organization-ah, he website-ah emaw, an pahnihah emaw dah theih a ni.

IATF chuan a tihchhuah hmain mi mal contact details, private address te, leh assistive technology hmangtu hrang hrangte chanchin kimchang hriat theih thilte chu tihchhuah a tum chiang a, a remchang a nih loh chuan a paih bo a ni.
Discord hi informal coordination atan hman a ni a. IATF chuan Discord inbiakna hi a hranpahin a archive lo a, message retention hi Discord-in a thunun a ni.
Request records hi search engine indexing-ah chuan a hman theih chin a awm lo. Public tih chu review theih leh accountable tihna a ni. Name search hmanga hmuh theih tura optimized tih a ni lo.

IATF-in a thunun public surfaces-a record-te a update thei a, a paih thei bawk a; mahse, third-party cache, notification, fork, screenshot, search engine, Discord, emaw, external system-ahte chuan a paih theih a ni lo.
Thuchah chu private a nih reng a ngai a nih chuan, IATF public channel kaltlangin thawn suh.

chair.lead: He chair hian IATF chu organization-level stewardship a nei a. Hei hi project-a engineer mawhphurhna atanga danglam a ni: chair hi organization pum huapa mawhphurtu a ni a, repository pakhat day-to-day kaihhruaina a ni lo.

duties.title: Chair chuan eng nge a tih?
items: IATF GitHub organization-ah a neitu phalna a nei
Project pawm leh archiving chungchanga thutlukna siam
IATF-in mipuite a biak theihna hmun a ni
duties.footnote: Chairman chuan IATF chu private delivery, paid work, or service-level agreements-ah a phuhru lo a, technical direction chungchanga repository-per-maintainer thutlukna chu a thunun lo bawk.

election.title: Kum tin inthlanna
paragraphs: Chairman hi kum khatah vawi khat thlan tlin a ni a. Inthlan hi December thla chawlhkar hnih hmasa berah a awm a, result chu December ni 15 thleng puan a ni ang a, term thar chu January ni 1-ah a ṭan ang.

Voters eligible te hi kum khat chhunga IATF repository-a maintainer role chelh tawh leh kum khatah IAT F repositoriy-a merged contribution vawi khat tal pe tawh te an ni. Voter eligible tin hian vote khat an nei ṭheuh a. Vote nei tam ber chuan a hneh a; a tluk loh chuan December thla chawlhkar thumnaah run-off neih a ni ang.
Inthlan hi IATF governance repository-a public GitHub Discussion anga kalpui a ni a, chuvangin candidate te, vote te, leh result te chu public record a ni vek a ni.

continuity.title: Hlawhtlingna
paragraphs: Kum khat chhunga inthlan neih a nih loh chuan Chairman-in a nihna a chelh chhunzawm zel ang a, inthlan leh a nih hma chuan a la chelh reng ang.
Chairman chu engtik lai pawhin a inhnukdawk thei a. Active maintainer-te chuan a chhan sawiin extraordinary election an ko thei bawk a, annual election ang bawkin an thlang thei a ni.

chair.footnote: Chairman chanvo chu kum 2026-ah siam a ni a, chutih hun hma chuan a dintu chuan a mawhphurhna a chelh ṭhin a ni.

states.title: Project dinhmun
paragraphs: Project-te hian public state tlemte an hmang a:
states.footnote: Hêng state-te hian registry chu scan a awlsam a ni.

reassignment.title: Puan lehna leh archive-na
paragraphs: Maintainer-a'n hna a bansan emaw, a thawk lo emaw a nih chuan, IATF chuan mawhphurhna a pe leh thei a, hmasawnna a tihtawp emaw, project a archive thei a ni.
Project pakhat chu a ṭûlna bulpui chu tihhlawhtlin a nih chuan, a enkawlna chu tihtawp a nih pawhin, a thawh chhunzawm theih a nih loh pawhin, archive a ni thei bawk a ni.
reassignment.footnote: Sawrkâr siamte chu chhan ṭha tak a awm loh chuan mipuite hmuh theihin a awm reng a ni.

items: private client-te hnên aṭanga pêk chhuah
project tinte tan hun rei tak enkawlna
boundaries.footnote: IATF hi public repository model a ni a, private delivery service a ni lo.
